---
name: ui-consistency-checker
description: "Use when auditing or refactoring frontend UI for atomic component reuse, Tailwind-first styling, responsive behavior, and naming consistency."
---

# UI Consistency Checker

This skill keeps the UI layer aligned with the repository's reusable component and styling rules.

## Use This Skill For

- Replacing hardcoded markup with existing Atoms or Molecules where appropriate.
- Converting custom styling to Tailwind utilities when that improves consistency.
- Reviewing responsive behavior and component naming patterns.

## Workflow

1. Inspect existing reusable UI before introducing new primitives.
2. Favor Tailwind for standard layout and visual rules.
3. Keep SCSS scoped and justified when utilities are insufficient.
